keywords.fare: Thou art truly in possession of fine manners. Blessings upon you!
keywords.thee: Thou art truly in possession of fine manners. Blessings upon you!
keywords.well: Thou art truly in possession of fine manners. Blessings upon you!
keywords.job: As should be quite obvious, I am operating a steamship.
keywords.work: As should be quite obvious, I am operating a steamship.
keywords.name: I am Gurbasch Firejuggler, son of the machine, of the Molten Rock.
keywords.ship: It is indeed something we dwarfs may be proud of: a ship operating by steam power.
keywords.steamship: It is indeed something we dwarfs may be proud of: a ship operating by steam power.
keywords.technomancer: A technomancer wields power over incredible machines, as his knowledge is his magic.
keywords.inventors: You know, elves may be intelligent, but they are too lazy to invent. Really.
keywords.inventions: You know, elves may be intelligent, but they are too lazy to invent. Really.
keywords.thais: How do you expect me to go there? Fly? Hm, wait... no, sorry.

keywords.beer: Ah, you got some? Nah, beer only tastes fine in Kazordoon. If you have brought it from there, it tastes foul now, I guess.
keywords.dwarf: We are an old and proud race, although we posess the best inventions.
keywords.brodrosch: He is my brother working the Kazordoon steamship.
keywords.elves: Have one elf onboard a ship, and you are doomed.

keywords.kazordoon: Do you want to go to Kazordoon? And try the beer there? 150 gold?

texts: As should be quite obvious, I am operating a steamship.

entries.response: I'm sorry, but you need a premium account in order to travel onboard our ships.
